mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY join_time ASC
SELECT * FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM chat_session_member WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND user_id != #{excludeUserId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO chat_session_member (session_id, user_id, role, status, join_time) VALUES
(#{member.sessionId}, #{member.userId}, #{member.role}, #{member.status}, #{member.joinTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_message_read WHERE message_id = #{messageId} AND user_id = #{userId}
